title: zanthoxylum fauriei
intro: Zanthoxylum fauriei, also known as Korean prickly ash, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rutaceae, native to Korea and parts of China. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant compounds that can help to soothe digestive issues and reduce pain. The health benefits of Zanthoxylum fauriei include reducing symptoms of irritable bowel syndrome, alleviating menstrual cramps, and supporting immune function. Zanthoxylum fauriei is typically prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and is also used in traditional medicine to make tinctures and salves.
